title: John Deere Announces B30 Biodiesel Compatibility Across Engine Portfolio
content: John Deere announced the approval of B30 biodiesel use across its entire portfolio of Tier 4 John Deere engines. This increases the previous approval of blends up to B20. The announcement will also be highlighted this week at the 2025 Farm Progress Show in Decatur, IL, where all John Deere equipment operated in the companyâ€™s Ride and Drive area will run on B30 biodiesel.â€œThis is a win-win situation for U.S. soybean farmers and rural communities,â€ said Caleb Ragland, President of the American Soybean Association and Kentucky soybean farmer.
author: Analysts Account
